case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JORGE CARLOS BOTEO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-25-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. JHONATAN HERRADA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JORGE CARLOS BOTEO DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,277.16 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BOTEO, JORGE CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED MAR-18-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOTEO, JORGE CARLOS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-25-2019. NO APPEARANCES AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
